headline: Jacobs Solutions (J) Selected for 288MW Palmer Wind Farm Project
summary: Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE:J) is one of the 15 Best Data Center Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next Decade. On July 2, 2026, Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE:J) was selected by Tilt Renewables as Owner’s Engineer for its 288-megawatt Palmer Wind Farm near Adelaide, South Australia. The project will feature 407.2MW wind turbine generators, […]
